item.title: Kubernetes Limit Node Access
item.author: Author
item.description: Rules Create Cluster in Private Network The Cluster(Private Network) is NOT ALLOWED public network. The Cluster(Private Network) can ACCESS VPN. The Cluster(Private Network) can ACCESS specific IP ranges. The Cluster(Private Network) can ACCESS who is needed. Server Account Types User Accounts User Accounts This is for normal user for ftp, ssh, etc. Superuser Account Superuser This is mean, typically root user. It’s UID = 0.
